Plaintiff'S Application For Right To Attach Order And/Or Temporary Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
David S. Mendelsohn, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: El D.R. Zion Diamonds LTD.

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff El D.R. Zion Diamonds, LTD's ex parte application for right to attach order and writ of attachment is denied at this
time. The application for a temporary protective order is granted. The order shall remain in effect until October 29, 2008 so that plaintiff may filed a noticed application for a right to attach order and writ. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
